notes: Multiple established US brands already exist - A Pot for Pot, Smart Pots, AC Infinity fabric pots. Cannabis growing market already saturated with air-pruning solutions. No brand gap.
Vertical fabric garden towers already common in US market - similar products from multiple brands on Amazon. Air-pruning fabric category is crowded.
Premium Japanese-style garden tools already available in US through multiple retailers and brands. Competitive space with established players.

Hori hori knives are widely available in US from multiple brands - Nisaku, Truly Garden, others. Well-known product, no US gap. Mentioned in rejection notes that US versions exist but poorly branded, but validation shows decent branded options available.
